_comment: Single source of truth for game tuning. Edit values here; user://settings.cfg is not used in this dev stage.

baked_edge_soften_px.comment: Deprecated: trail feather now uses edge_feather_px via unified radial shader feather

buffer_size_cells.comment: Sliding fog window size in cells; fog texture is 1 texel per cell (radial edge feather in shader)

edge_aa_strength.comment: Optional screen-space edge AA on combined reveal (0 = off, restores pre-zoom-fix look)

edge_feather_px.comment: Fog edge softness in map px (baked mask + live disc); does not affect terrain

initial_reveal_corner_radius.comment: Corner rounding (cells) for spawn rounded-square reveal; 0 = auto (~25% of initial radius). Keep small for square-with-filleted-corners.

initial_reveal_radius.comment: Spawn rounded-square reveal radius (cells); outer edge uses radius+0.5 cells for cell coverage; config-only, applied at bootstrap

motion_bake_interval_sec.comment: Deprecated: motion trail uses live shader disc while moving; bake runs on stop/cell cross only

gpu_commit_min_interval_sec.comment: Min seconds between throttled GPU mask uploads; cell cross forces immediate flush

motion_bake_min_distance_px.comment: Min map pixels moved before throttled trail bake (~half cell at 64px)

recenter_margin_cells.comment: Re-center buffer when player is within this many cells of the buffer edge

reveal_fade_seconds.comment: Presentation fade from foggy to clear; 0 = instant snap

debug_grid_lines.comment: Fullscreen grid shader overlay; disable for higher idle FPS

acceleration.comment: Map-local px/s² at view.zoom default (0.5); PlayerController scales by (zoom/default)^2

friction.comment: Map-local px/s² at view.zoom default (0.5); PlayerController scales by (zoom/default)^2

max_speed.comment: Map-local px/s at view.zoom default (0.5); PlayerController scales by (zoom/default)^2

internal_scale.comment: Render resolution scale (1.0 = native viewport; 0.5 = half pixels)

max_fps.comment: Engine frame cap; 0 = unlimited (respects vsync when enabled)

show_origin_marker.comment: Debug: draw map grid origin (0,0) cross under Tiles (scales with zoom)

vsync_enabled.comment: When true, caps FPS to monitor refresh; disable to measure uncapped headroom

chunk_show_min_paint_cells.comment: Min cells painted before a streaming chunk TileMapLayer becomes visible; avoids hollow perimeter flash

max_paint_cells_per_frame.comment: Hard cap on set_cell calls per frame across all chunk paint jobs; burst raises job concurrency only

max_gen_cells_per_frame.comment: Hard cap on terrain gen cells per frame; burst raises job concurrency only

load_radius.comment: Chunk keep ring radius around player; 2 = 5x5 chunks minimum

motion_lead_chunks.comment: Prefetch ring shifted along velocity by this many chunks

motion_reprio_min_speed_px.comment: Map px/s; above this, pending chunk loads bias toward movement direction

motion_reprio_interval_sec.comment: Min seconds between in-chunk motion prefetch/burst refreshes (chunk cross still immediate)
